gearhaven_plaza.name: Cogwheel Plaza
gearhaven_plaza.description: Steam hisses from pipes and gears grind beneath your feet. Merchants shout over the clatter while travelers mingle in the plaza.

gearhaven_workshop.name: Gearhaven Workshop
gearhaven_workshop.description: Inventors toil with strange contraptions here, the air thick with the scent of oil and magic.

shadowfen_camp.name: Shadowfen Camp
shadowfen_camp.description: A dark encampment surrounded by murky waters where warriors of Umbra sharpen their blades.

shadowfen_bog.name: Shadowfen Bog
shadowfen_bog.description: Thick mist blankets the soggy ground and the croak of unseen creatures echoes all around.

neutral_crossroads.name: Crossroads
neutral_crossroads.description: A dusty intersection where caravans pause and news from all factions is traded.

elven_glade_path.name: Elven Forest Road
elven_glade_path.description: A serene path lined with ancient trees leading to the high elf city.

elven_glade.name: Elven Glade
elven_glade.description: Homes built high in the trees sparkle with arcane light.

dwarf_fort_path.name: Stone Tunnel
dwarf_fort_path.description: A well-carved tunnel slopes downward toward a dwarven stronghold.

dwarf_fortress.name: Dwarf Fortress
dwarf_fortress.description: Massive stone walls guard the halls of the stout folk.

gnome_burrow_path.name: Gnome Tunnel
gnome_burrow_path.description: A cramped tunnel lit by flickering lanterns.

gnome_burrow.name: Gnome Burrow
gnome_burrow.description: A maze of cozy burrows bustling with tinkering gnomes.

orc_stronghold_path.name: Blasted Trail
orc_stronghold_path.description: A rough trail littered with bones leading to the orc stronghold.

orc_stronghold.name: Orc Stronghold
orc_stronghold.description: A fortified camp echoing with war drums.

undead_trail.name: Forsaken Path
undead_trail.description: A chilling road lined with the remnants of battles long past.

undead_necropolis.name: Undead Necropolis
undead_necropolis.description: Crumbling mausoleums rise from dark soil under a perpetual gloom.

dawn_isle_port.name: Dawn Isle Port
dawn_isle_port.description: A small harbor where boats depart for distant lands.
